Name: Sander Head
Description:
The Columbia Sander Head incorporates all of the industry’s preferred functionalities in the first fully machined billet aluminum body. Utilizing our No Flip technology, our Sander Head flows smoothly on the wall.

We have chosen to use the standard paint handle thread to give users many handle options. The handle will fit any paint handle fixed or extendable.

Features:

  • Guaranteed No Flip Technology
  • Industry preferred design
  • Works with paint handle thread
  • Billet machined in our state of the art facility in Canada

Name: The Phantom Sander
Description:
The Columbia Phantom DDM Sander incorporates all of the industries preferred functionality in a beautifully machine billet body. This commercial grade dustless sander works with any vacuum with a 1.5″ inlet and collects 99% of dust! The Phantom comes with the all billet aluminum sanding head, the 30 ft hose, and the extendible (26″ to 46″) pole.

Features:

  • All billet aluminum head
  • Handle adaptor rotates 360
  • Comes with 30 ft hose
  • Comes with extendible (26″ to 46″) handle
  • Billet machined in our state of the art facility in Canada
